description: |-
  Lists every tool currently assigned to an agent. Use this when you need to fan out resources per assigned tool — e.g. apply a archestra_tool_invocation_policy to every tool the agent has, without hardcoding tool names:
  
  data "archestra_agent_tools" "all" {

    for_each = { for t in data.archestra_agent_tools.all.tools : t.tool_id => t }

    conditions  = [{ key = "context", operator = "equal", value = "untrusted" }]
    action      = "block_when_context_is_untrusted"
  }

# archestra_agent_tools (Data Source)

Lists every tool currently assigned to an agent. Use this when you need to fan out resources per assigned tool — e.g. apply a `archestra_tool_invocation_policy` to every tool the agent has, without hardcoding tool names:

```hcl
data "archestra_agent_tools" "all" {
  agent_id = archestra_agent.support.id
}

resource "archestra_tool_invocation_policy" "block_unsafe" {
  for_each = { for t in data.archestra_agent_tools.all.tools : t.tool_id => t }
  tool_id  = each.value.tool_id
  description = "Block ${each.value.name} when the request originates from untrusted context"
  conditions  = [{ key = "context", operator = "equal", value = "untrusted" }]
  action      = "block_when_context_is_untrusted"
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "archestra_agent_tools" "support_agent_tools" {
  agent_id = archestra_agent.support.id
}

# Fan out a per-tool invocation policy without listing tool names by hand.
resource "archestra_tool_invocation_policy" "block_unsafe" {
  for_each    = { for t in data.archestra_agent_tools.support_agent_tools.tools : t.tool_id => t }
  tool_id     = each.value.tool_id
  description = "Block ${each.value.name} when context is untrusted"
  conditions  = [{ key = "context", operator = "equal", value = "untrusted" }]
  action      = "block_when_context_is_untrusted"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_id` (String) Agent UUID. Pulls the assignment list from `/api/agent-tools?agentId=<id>`.

### Read-Only

- `tools` (Attributes List) Every tool currently assigned to the agent, including assignment-level metadata. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tools))

<a id="nestedatt--tools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tools`

Read-Only:

- `assignment_id` (String) Agent-tool assignment composite UUID. **Not** what `archestra_tool_invocation_policy.tool_id` expects — see `tool_id` below for that.
- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the assignment was made. Useful as a stable sort key.
- `credential_resolution_mode` (String) How the agent resolves the credential it uses to call this tool: `static`, `dynamic`, or `enterprise_managed`. See the matching field on `archestra_agent_tool`.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description as advertised by the MCP server. May be null.
- `mcp_server_id` (String) MCP server installation UUID this assignment is bound to. Null for tools assigned without a specific install (e.g. delegated tools).
- `name` (String) Tool name (the MCP server's own identifier — stable across installs of the same catalog item).
- `tool_id` (String) Bare tool UUID. Pass this as `tool_id` on `archestra_tool_invocation_policy` / `archestra_trusted_data_policy`.
